headline.purpose: Page titles in PageHeader; one per screen.

body.purpose: Default reading text and table cells; prose caps 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase column heads, filter labels, badge and eyebrow text.

data.purpose: Plex Mono tabular figures for money, IDs, counts, timestamps (.tnum).

bangla.purpose: Bangla explanation copy in Noto Sans Bengali at 1.85 line-height (.bangla).

shadows.name: card-whisper
shadows.purpose: The only shadow in the system: a near-invisible, ink-tinted lift on cards. Depth otherwise comes from borders and tonal layering.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Color-only transitions on hover/focus/active for controls. 150-250ms; motion conveys state, never decoration.

motion.name: skeleton-shimmer
motion.purpose: The single ambient motion: loading skeleton sweep. Suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on a surface. Solid Vault Teal.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #0e3a34; background: #0e3a34; color: #eaf3f1; font: 500 14px/1 "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #12514a; border-color: #12514a; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0e3a34; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The everyday control: surface fill, strong hairline outline.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #c5d0d1; background: #ffffff; color: #10201e; font: 500 14px/1 "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f7f9f9; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0e3a34; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: A consequential action (never an accusation): bordered Signal Red, not a blaring fill.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #c4162b; background: #ffffff; color: #c4162b; font: 500 14px/1 "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #fbe4e6; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c4162b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Provider Tag
components.description: Provider identity (whose money): an outlined, glyph-led named pill. The shape + name is what keeps it distinct from a severity badge.
components.css: .ds-provider-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #e21380; background: #fde7f3; color: #e21380; font: 500 12px/1.4 "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-provider-tag .ds-glyph { font-size: 0.7em; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Severity Badge
components.description: Severity (how urgent): a filled, dotted, uppercase badge. Structurally distinct from the outlined provider tag; means urgent-to-review, not guilty.
components.css: .ds-sev-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 6px; background: #fbe4e6; color: #c4162b; font: 600 11px/1.3 "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-sev-badge .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #c4162b; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Alerts-list filter pill. Active = solid teal; inactive = surface with hairline outline.
components.css: .ds-chips { display: inline-flex; gap: 6px; } .ds-chip { padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #c5d0d1; background: #ffffff; color: #5c6f6c; font: 500 12px/1 "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #f7f9f9; } .ds-chip-active, .ds-chip-active:hover { background: #0e3a34; border-color: #0e3a34; color: #eaf3f1; }

components.name: Card
components.description: The reading surface: white on the page ground, separated by a hairline border and the single whisper shadow, not elevation.
components.html:
Evidence
Signals the detector measured for this window.
components.css: .ds-card { border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #dbe2e3; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(16,32,30,0.04); padding: 20px; font-family: "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font: 600 14px/1.4 "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; color: #10201e; } .ds-card-body { margin-top: 4px; font: 400 14px/1.55 "IBM Plex Sans", system-ui, sans-serif; color: #5c6f6c; }

narrative.overview: Vault is designed like the back office of a bank, not the front counter. The room is quiet, the light is even, the figures on the ledger are exact, and the only warmth is a thin line of brass. Deep vault-teal owns the chrome; everything else is a calm near-white surface with hairline borders, so the analyst's attention goes to the numbers and the signals, never to the interface. The system is deliberately dense and flat: depth is drawn with 1px borders and tonal layering, not shadow theatrics. Color is rationed hard and split into strictly separate channels: teal is the app's own voice, provider colors say whose money, and severity colors say how urgent, and those channels are never allowed to blur.
keyCharacteristics: Deep vault-teal chrome; calm near-white content surfaces; brass used only as a hairline accent.
Flat, border-defined depth: hairline borders and tonal layering, not shadow.
Three separate categorical color channels (brand / provider / severity) that never blur.
Tabular monospace figures for every monetary or numeric readout.
Bilingual by construction: English and Bangla at parity, Bangla in a dedicated Bengali face.
Institutional, precise, calm: the tool disappears into the task.

rules.name: The Three-Channel Rule
rules.body: Brand, provider, and severity are three separate color languages and must never be confused. Teal is the product's own voice; provider hues mean whose money and only ever appear as shaped, named tags; severity hues mean how urgent and only ever appear as filled, labelled badges.

rules.name: The Rationed Teal Rule
rules.body: The brand teal carries chrome, primary action, and selection, nothing decorative. If teal is spreading into content surfaces or standing in for status, it is being overused.

rules.name: The Tabular Figure Rule
rules.body: Every monetary or numeric readout uses .tnum (Plex Mono + tabular-nums). Numbers that shift horizontally between rows are a defect.

rules.name: The Bilingual Parity Rule
rules.body: English and Bangla are equals. Bangla renders in Noto Sans Bengali at its own comfortable size and 1.85 line-height, and every alert explanation carries both languages.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces separate by border and tone, not shadow. If you reach for a drop shadow to distinguish two panels, add a hairline border or step the tone to Surface Sunken instead.

dos: Do keep the three color channels separate: teal for the product's own voice, provider hues only as shaped named tags, severity hues only as filled labelled badges.
Do render every monetary or numeric value with .tnum (Plex Mono + tabular figures) so columns align.
Do show the exact triggering figures on every alert, explainable by construction, never a bare score.
Do give provider and severity a shape/label difference, not just a color difference, so meaning survives color blindness.
Do treat Bangla as an equal: Noto Sans Bengali, its own comfortable size and 1.85 line-height, present alongside English.
Do separate surfaces with 1px borders and tonal layering (Surface over Page Ground over Surface Sunken).
Do keep body text at Ink/Ink-2 and confirm Muted text clears 4.5:1; honor prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't make it look like a consumer fintech app: no bright gradients, playful mascots, or marketing gloss. This is NOT a consumer app.
Don't make it an enforcement dashboard: no blaring red alarms, no BLOCKED, no language or color that presumes guilt. Signal Red means urgent to review, not guilty.
Don't ship a generic admin template: no Bootstrap/Material sea of identical rounded cards with no point of view.
Don't present a black-box score: never a risk number without the evidence behind it.
Don't let bKash Magenta drift back toward the official #E2136E if it starts reading as Signal Red at badge size; keep the raised blue channel (#e21380).
Don't add drop shadows to separate panels; add a border or step the tone instead.
Don't use display fonts, gradient text, or side-stripe (border-left) accents anywhere; controls stay in the one restrained Plex vocabulary.
Don't spread the brand teal into content or use it to signal status; ration it to chrome, primary action, and selection.
